title: A blue star-like UFO was spotted by five people in Brasília-DF [1994]
excerpt: DEC 14th, 1994. 04h00 am. Duration: not determined. In Brasília, Distrito Federal, a military man and four more people observed an unidentified flying object with the shape of a blue star. According to the information from the military witness, the UFO was sighted in the vicinity of Lago Sul in Brasília, and was observed with […]
text_preview:
DEC 14th, 1994. 04h00 am. Duration: not determined. In Brasília, Distrito Federal, a military man and four more people observed an unidentified flying object with the shape of a blue star. According to the information from the military witness, the UFO was sighted in the vicinity of Lago Sul in Brasília, and was observed with clear skies and good visibility conditions. The witness was unable to estimate the altitude and speed of the blue star sighted in that region south of Brasilia.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Ide
summary: A military witness and four others in Brasília observed a blue star-shaped UFO near Lago Sul on December 14, 1994.
